headline: Google Ads Metrics Extraction Blocked: OAuth 400 Error Prevents Campaign Data Access
highlights: CRITICAL BLOCKER: Google OAuth token refresh failed (400 Bad Request)
Cannot retrieve campaign metrics, impressions, clicks, or conversions
CAC calculation undefined — total conversions unverifiable
3 previous tasks marked 'completed' cannot be verified without API access
Created 4 comprehensive documentation files: incident report, recovery plan, gap analysis, JSON structure
Campaign existence unconfirmed — may indicate launch task never executed
Zero conversions likely — indicates either no traffic or broken conversion tracking
Provided 8-step OAuth recovery guide with fallback options (manual export, service account)
Business unit economics validation completely blocked until metrics restored

next_actions.label: Step 1: Restore OAuth Credentials
next_actions.task_template: Follow 8-step recovery guide in recovery-plan.md to re-authenticate Google Ads API

next_actions.label: Step 2: Verify Campaign Exists
next_actions.task_template: Once OAuth restored, run googleads_list_campaigns() to confirm 'Agency Reporting Software' campaign is active

next_actions.label: Step 3: Re-run Metrics Extraction
next_actions.task_template: Execute full metrics extraction and populate google-ads-metrics-2026-04-21.json with real campaign data

next_actions.label: Step 4: Calculate Verified CAC
next_actions.task_template: Once metrics retrieved: CAC = Total Spend ÷ Total Conversions; flag if zero conversions or > $100/month

next_actions.label: Step 5: Audit Previous Tasks
next_actions.task_template: Review 'Analyze Google Ads performance after 7 days' task; compare claimed CAC with newly calculated value
